# People

## Alex (lead dev)

- **Role:** Frontend lead, 3 years experience
- **Context:** Owns the design system, reviews all component PRs
- **Strengths:** CSS, accessibility, performance
- **Watch for:** Over-engineers abstractions, tends to add "just in case" props
- **Communication:** Prefers short PRs with clear descriptions. Gets frustrated by large diffs.
- **Last interaction:** 2026-03-01

## Marina (PM)

- **Role:** Product manager
- **Context:** Manages the customer portal project
- **Communication:** Prefers bullet points over prose. Wants ETAs even if rough.
- **Last interaction:** 2026-02-20
